steps.title: What Index is
steps.narration: Index reads a whole codebase and hands you a living map of it. Think of it as the atlas the rest of the tools navigate by.
steps.command: echo index - repository maps, dependency graph, and receipt-backed context packs
steps.stdout: index - repository maps, dependency graph, and receipt-backed context packs
steps.output: index - repository maps, dependency graph, and receipt-backed context packs

steps.title: The capability surface
steps.narration: One front door opens onto the full surface: map the repo, derive the dependency graph, budget a context envelope, watch for drift, even render a live context lens. Every one of these is offline and reproducible.
steps.stdout:
usage: index [-h] [--version]
             {status,doctor,demo,map,graph,context,context-envelope,watch,lens,select,viz,atlas,workbench,wiki,internals,internals-symbols,symbols,check,snapshot,drift,router,verify,freshness,invalidate,bench,serve,lsp,mcp}
             ...

Repository inventory maps + dependency graph + context packs.

positional arguments:
  {status,doctor,demo,map,graph,context,context-envelope,watch,lens,select,viz,atlas,workbench,wiki,internals,internals-symbols,symbols,check,snapshot,drift,router,verify,freshness,invalidate,bench,serve,lsp,mcp}
    status              emit Index's Project Telos operator-spine status
    doctor              check Index's operator-spine readiness
    demo                show Index's operator-spine demo command
    map                 Write the repository inventory map (default).
    graph               Derive the repo-level dependency graph.
    context             Render the synthesis context pack.
    context-envelope    Emit a budgeted, receipt-backed context envelope.
    watch               Auto-resync on file change: hold the prior
                        fingerprint, emit a live FRESH/STALE receipt per
                        change, optionally regenerate an artifact.
    lens                Render the Context Lens: a live, self-contained page
                        showing what a token budget retains and drops, with
                        failure codes.
    select              Select files under a root; every rejection carries a
                        typed receipt.
    viz                 Render the dependency graph (html/svg/mermaid).
    atlas               Two-layer code + knowledge map (repos + docs).
    workbench           Render the unified workbench: map, docs, context lens,
                        health, and the flagship spine in one self-contained
                        page.
    wiki                Single-repo verified wiki: pages derived from the
                        module graph, sealed and commit-pinned; --verify re-
                        checks a sealed artifact.
    internals           Intra-repo module dependency graph.
    internals-symbols   Symbol-level call/reference graph for one repo (Python
                        AST-exact within-module; best-effort, honestly-labeled
                        cross-module).
    symbols             Navigate the symbol graph: go-to-definition, find-
                        references, and find-implementations for a symbol,
                        each hop with file:line evidence.
    check               Check structure against the declared [architecture]
                        criterion.
    snapshot            Write a canonical graph snapshot for drift diffing.
    drift               Diff two snapshots into a drift report.
    router              Emit a workspace map (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) from the
                        graph and docs.
    verify              Ground a structural claim against the graph
                        (MATCH/REFUTED/UNVERIFIABLE).
    freshness           Has the workspace changed since a certificate was
                        minted? (FRESH/STALE).
    invalidate          Diff the tree against a pinned fingerprint and name
                        exactly what the changes invalidate (FRESH/STALE).
    bench               Token economy: index's structural pack vs reading the
                        source it distills.
    serve               Local http.server that derives a repo's verified wiki
                        on demand from its forge path (consent-clean;
                        robots.txt disallows indexing).
    lsp                 Start a stdio LSP server exposing go-to-definition and
                        find-references over the symbol graph
                        (VSCode/Neovim/JetBrains). Answers are evidence-backed
                        file:line or honestly empty; a stale workspace is
                        detected, never silently answered.
    mcp                 Serve the MCP-shaped stdio protocol face (JSON-RPC
                        over stdin/stdout).

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit

steps.title: A status receipt
steps.narration: And here is the part that makes it trustworthy. Index reports its own state as a small receipt you can re-check, and even suggests the next honest step. A tool that keeps its own scorecard is a tool you can build on.
steps.stdout:
status=MATCH tool=index command=status
next: gather docs - gather docs backing structural decisions
steps.output:
status=MATCH tool=index command=status
next: gather docs - gather docs backing structural decisions
